doc: UI-locale resolution (spec §3): resolve the app's DISPLAY language from the configured override and the system locale, over available = [zh-CN, en, ja, ko]. SEPARATE from the translation target language — never conflate. Order: (1) non-empty configUiLang that is in available wins; (2) else map systemLocale by primary language subtag (case-insensitive) zh*→zh-CN (v1: all Chinese), ja*→ja, ko*→ko, en*→en; (3) else en. Both platforms read this same vector so resolution never drifts.
